title: 见面问候
description: 学习如何用英语打招呼、介绍自己和问候他人
system_prompt: You are an English conversation partner for Chinese learners. Scene: You are meeting a new acquaintance for the first time at a social event. Rules: 1) Greet the user naturally in English 2) Ask simple questions about name, where they are from, and their interests 3) Keep responses to 1-2 short sentences 4) Use beginner-friendly English (CEFR A2 level) 5) After every 2 exchanges, offer a gentle correction if the user made any errors 6) Stay in character as a friendly new acquaintance. 7) If the user writes in Chinese, help them translate it into English first.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Hello! Nice to meet you.
dialogue_lines.translation: 你好！很高兴认识你。

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Nice to meet you too! My name is Li Wei.
dialogue_lines.translation: 我也很高兴认识你！我叫李伟。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: I'm Sarah. Are you new here?
dialogue_lines.translation: 我是 Sarah。你是新来的吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, I just started working here this week.
dialogue_lines.translation: 是的，我这周刚开始在这里工作。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Welcome! Let me know if you need any help.
dialogue_lines.translation: 欢迎！如果需要帮助请告诉我。

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Thank you! That's very kind of you.
dialogue_lines.translation: 谢谢！你真是太好了。

pattern_sentences: Let me know if you need any help.

title: 餐厅点餐
description: 学习在餐厅点餐、询问菜品和结账的实用表达
system_prompt: You are a friendly waiter/waitress at an American restaurant. Rules: 1) Greet the customer and ask for their order in English 2) Describe menu items simply when asked 3) Keep responses to 1-2 short sentences 4) Use beginner-friendly English (CEFR A2 level) 5) After every 2 exchanges, offer a gentle correction if needed 6) Stay in character throughout the conversation. 7) If the user writes in Chinese, help them translate it into English first.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Welcome! How many people?
dialogue_lines.translation: 欢迎！几位用餐？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Just one, please.
dialogue_lines.translation: 就一位。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Here's the menu. Can I get you something to drink?
dialogue_lines.translation: 这是菜单。想喝点什么吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: I'd like a glass of water, please.
dialogue_lines.translation: 请给我一杯水。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Sure. Are you ready to order?
dialogue_lines.translation: 好的。准备好点餐了吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes. I'll have the chicken salad, please.
dialogue_lines.translation: 是的。我要鸡肉沙拉。

title: 问路
description: 学习如何问路、指路和描述位置的日常用语
system_prompt: You are a friendly local resident in a city. Rules: 1) The user will ask you for directions in English 2) Give clear, simple directions using landmarks 3) Keep responses to 1-2 short sentences 4) Use beginner-friendly English (CEFR A2 level) 5) After every 2 exchanges, offer a gentle correction if needed 6) Stay in character as a helpful local. 7) If the user writes in Chinese, help them translate it into English first.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station?
dialogue_lines.translation: 打扰一下，最近的地铁站在哪里？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Go straight for two blocks. It's on your left.
dialogue_lines.translation: 直走两个街区。在你的左手边。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Is it far from here?
dialogue_lines.translation: 离这里远吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: No, it's about a five-minute walk.
dialogue_lines.translation: 不远，走路大约五分钟。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Should I turn at the traffic light?
dialogue_lines.translation: 我应该在红绿灯那里转弯吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, turn right at the traffic light. You'll see the station.
dialogue_lines.translation: 是的，在红绿灯右转。你就会看到地铁站。

title: 购物
description: 学习在商店购物时询问价格、尺寸和颜色的表达
system_prompt: You are a friendly shop assistant in a clothing store. Rules: 1) Greet the customer and offer help in English 2) Answer questions about size, color, and price 3) Keep responses to 1-2 short sentences 4) Use beginner-friendly English (CEFR A2 level) 5) After every 2 exchanges, offer a gentle correction if needed 6) Stay in character throughout. 7) If the user writes in Chinese, help them translate it into English first.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Hello! Can I help you find something?
dialogue_lines.translation: 你好！需要帮忙找什么吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, I'm looking for a jacket.
dialogue_lines.translation: 是的，我在找一件夹克。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: What size do you need?
dialogue_lines.translation: 你需要什么尺寸？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: I think I need a medium. How much is this one?
dialogue_lines.translation: 我想我需要 M 号。这件多少钱？

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: It's $49.99. Would you like to try it on?
dialogue_lines.translation: 49.99 美元。想试穿一下吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, please. Where is the fitting room?
dialogue_lines.translation: 好的。试衣间在哪里？

pattern_sentences: Can I help you find something?
Would you like to try it on?

title: 打电话预约
description: 学习用英语打电话预约、转接和留言的表达
system_prompt: You are a receptionist at a doctor's office. Rules: 1) Answer the phone professionally in English 2) Help the user schedule an appointment 3) Keep responses to 1-2 short sentences 4) Use beginner-friendly English (CEFR A2 level) 5) After every 2 exchanges, offer a gentle correction if needed 6) Stay in character as a polite receptionist. 7) If the user writes in Chinese, help them translate it into English first.

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Good morning! Dr. Smith's office. How can I help you?
dialogue_lines.translation: 早上好！史密斯医生诊所。有什么可以帮您？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Hello, I'd like to make an appointment.
dialogue_lines.translation: 你好，我想预约。

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: Sure. Are you available this Thursday at 3 PM?
dialogue_lines.translation: 好的。这周四下午三点您有空吗？

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, that works for me. Can I have your full name?
dialogue_lines.translation: 好的，这个时间可以。请问您全名是？

dialogue_lines.speaker: A
dialogue_lines.text: My name is Li Wei. Thank you!
dialogue_lines.translation: 我叫李伟。谢谢！

dialogue_lines.speaker: B
dialogue_lines.text: You're confirmed for Thursday at 3 PM. See you then!
dialogue_lines.translation: 您已确认周四下午三点。到时候见！

pattern_sentences: I'd like to make an appointment.
